formulaHuman: Market Cap + (Short-Term Debt + Current Portion of Long-Term Debt + Current Portion of Leases + Long-Term Debt + Leases - Total Cash and Cash Equivalents) + Preferred Stock + Minority Interests

ST Debt + Current Portion of LT Debt + Current Portion of Leases + LT Debt + Leases + Preferred Stock + Common Stock + Minority Interest

metricName: Diluted Weighted Avg. Shares Outstanding 1Y Growth
formulaHuman: (Diluted Weighted Avg. Shares Outstanding / Diluted Weighted Avg. Shares Outstanding 1Y Ago) - 1

metricName: Diluted Weighted Avg. Shares Outstanding 3Y CAGR
formulaHuman: ((Diluted Weighted Avg. Shares Outstanding / Diluted Weighted Avg. Shares Outstanding 3Y Ago) ^ (1/3)) - 1

metricName: Diluted Weighted Avg. Shares Outstanding 5Y CAGR

metricName: Diluted Weighted Avg. Shares Outstanding 10Y CAGR
